title: schotia afra
intro: Schotia afra, also known as the karee tree, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Schotia afra include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving digestion, as well as offering protection against certain infections and diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
